summary: Audience tape from Morris with surprisingly clear sound, but reviewers are split on the show's quality.
review: One reviewer calls this Morris audience recording a pleasant surprise and says it sounds good, while another finds the performance boring and substandard. No specific songs or band moments are mentioned, leaving the musical content largely uncharacterized.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews give a high (5) and moderate (3) rating; average suggests a solid show with decent recording, but limited commentary reduces certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer praises the sound as clear and pleasant; another calls it substandard, indicating mixed impressions of the audio quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or performance were provided.
